title: Verify clicking trial widget navigates to Trial Corner
description: Test that clicking the trial widget or floating pill navigates the user to the Trial Corner Hub page
preconditions: User is on homepage with trial widget visible

steps.description: 1. Log in with trial user account
3. Click on the trial widget/floating pill

expected_result: User is redirected to Trial Corner page with all 5 sections visible (Hero, Progress & Benefits, Engagement, Trending, Manage Trial)
